name: agent-code
description: Designer-friendly VS Code mod: multi-agent dashboard + Design/Preview/Code workspace, powered by the Claude Agent SDK.

agentCode.openDashboardOnStartup.description: Open the Agents dashboard automatically when VS Code starts.

agentCode.backend.description: Agent backend. 'auto' uses real Claude Code via the Claude Agent SDK when installed (reusing your existing Claude Code login — no API key needed), otherwise falls back to a simulated mock backend.

agentCode.claudePath.description: Path to the `claude` CLI to drive (so the SDK reuses your logged-in subscription). Leave empty to auto-detect.

agentCode.userName.description: Name shown in the greeting. Leave empty to derive it from your OS username.

agentCode.fullAccess.description: Give agents maximum capability: disable the command sandbox, allow dangerous skips, and grant access to your home directory. Turn off for a more locked-down setup.

agentCode.defaultMode.description: Permission mode new agents start in. 'bypassPermissions' (Auto) = no prompts, can do everything; 'default' (Ask) = asks for each action.

agentCode.effort.description: Reasoning effort for new agents. Empty = SDK default.

agentCode.model.description: Model id for new agents (e.g. claude-opus-4-8). Empty = default.

agentCode.previewUrl.description: Default dev-server URL shown in the Design workspace preview.

agentCode.figmaMcpUrl.description: Figma desktop Dev-Mode MCP server URL. Lets agents pull Figma designs when you attach a Figma link. Enable 'Dev Mode MCP server' in Figma > Preferences. Leave empty to disable.

scripts.build: npm run build:webview && npm run build:ext
scripts.package: npm run build && vsce package -o agent-code.vsix
